message:
feat(engine): expand 40+ core modules with full runtime security, proof, and governance implementations

Massive expansion of the FrankenEngine core, bringing dozens of previously
stub or partial modules to full implementation. This work delivers the
foundational infrastructure for deterministic, mathematically rigorous
runtime security for untrusted extension code.

Security & containment:
- adversarial_coevolution_harness: full adversarial campaign orchestration
- ambient_authority: capability-based ambient authority enforcement
- containment_executor: sandbox execution with resource limits
- declassification_pipeline: controlled information declassification
- eprocess_guardrail: process-level security guardrails
- trust_zone: zone-based trust boundary enforcement

Cryptographic proof & evidence:
- mmr_proof: Merkle Mountain Range proof generation/verification
- proof_specialization_linkage: proof chain linkage across specializations
- proof_specialization_receipt: receipt generation for proof verification
- evidence_ordering: deterministic evidence ordering guarantees
- canonical_evidence_emitter: standardized evidence emission
- entropy_evidence_compressor: evidence compression with entropy coding

Runtime infrastructure:
- checkpoint: deterministic checkpoint/restore for sandboxed execution
- closure_model: closure capture and lifetime management
- deterministic_replay: record/replay for debugging and audit
- epoch_barrier: epoch-based synchronization barriers
- region_lifecycle: memory region lifecycle management
- module_cache: compiled module caching with invalidation
- gc: garbage collection improvements
- parser_error_recovery: resilient parser error recovery

Governance & monitoring:
- northstar_scorecard: multi-dimensional governance scoring
- disruption_scorecard: disruption impact assessment
- reputation: entity reputation tracking and decay
- trust_economics: trust cost/benefit economic modeling
- governance_mechanism: governance voting and decision fixes
- opportunity_matrix: opportunity cost analysis

Guardplane & calibration:
- guardplane_calibration: Bayesian guardplane parameter calibration
- bayesian_posterior: posterior distribution tracking
- policy_checkpoint: policy state checkpointing
- safe_mode_fallback: graceful degradation to safe mode
- assumptions_ledger: runtime assumption tracking and validation
- revocation_freshness: credential revocation freshness checks

Additional modules:
- control_plane/mod: expanded control plane orchestration
- control_plane_benchmark_split_gate: benchmark split-gate logic
- demo_claim_linkage_gate: claim linkage demonstration gate
- feature_parity_tracker: feature parity tracking expansion
- frankenlab_extension_lifecycle: lab extension lifecycle hooks
- golden_vectors: golden test vector management
- migration_contract: schema migration contract enforcement
- milestone_release_test_evidence_integrator: release milestone evidence
- object_model: object model refinements
- optimization_baseline: baseline optimization infrastructure
- primitive_adoption_schema: primitive type adoption tracking
- promotion_gate_runner: promotion gate orchestration
- receipt_verifier_pipeline: receipt verification pipeline fix
- region_lifecycle: region lifecycle management
- remote_computation_registry: remote computation registration
- runtime_diagnostics_cli: CLI diagnostics expansion
- spectral_fleet_convergence: fleet convergence analysis
- wave_handoff_contract: wave-based handoff contract enforcement

Minor fixups:
- frankentui_adapter, ts_module_resolution, activation_lifecycle,
  adversarial_campaign: small correctness and compatibility adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
